description_long: This is a sleek, modern business jet with a streamlined white fuselage, featuring a pointed nose and a row of oval windows along each side. The wings are swept back and mounted low on the fuselage, with subtle dihedral angles and no visible winglets. Two turbofan engines are mounted at the rear, integrated into the fuselage just ahead of the T-tail, which consists of a horizontal stabilizer mounted atop a single vertical fin. The landing gear is tricycle-type, with the main gear under the wings and a nose gear visible near the front. The aircraft displays branding and insignia on the tail and fuselage, and the cockpit is located at the forward end with a multi-panel windshield.
description: A modern white business jet with swept low wings, rear-mounted twin turbofan engines, and a T-tail. It features a forward cockpit, tricycle landing gear, and distinctive branding on the fuselage and tail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the fuselage, row of windows, open entry door, and clear view of the swept low wings and T-tail.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the twin rear-mounted engines, T-tail configuration, and the dihedral angle of the wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other row of windows, branding on the tail, and the clean lines of the fuselage and wings.
description_view_3: Front view showing the pointed nose, cockpit windows, nose landing gear, and the full wingspan with slight dihedral.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with swept wings and a slight dihedral angle, no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin rear-mounted turbofan engines integrated into the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: T-tail configuration with a single vertical stabilizer and a horizontal stabilizer mounted at the top.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with one nose gear and two main gear units.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multi-panel windshield and side windows.
